item.title: @Pinned: GPT-5.6 Sol, along with Terra and Luna, will launch publicly this Thursday. W...
item.description:
GPT-5.6 Sol, along with Terra and Luna, will launch publicly this Thursday.



We’re expanding preview access globally now.

item.title: @We’re introducing GeneBench-Pro, a research-level benchmark for a harder kind of AI progress: We’re introducing GeneBench-Pro, a research-level benchmark for a harder kind...
item.description:
We’re introducing GeneBench-Pro, a research-level benchmark for a harder kind of AI progress: how well agents can navigate messy biological data, choose the right analysis path, and make judgment calls that real computational research depends on.

openai.com/index/introducing…

Link





Introducing GeneBench-Pro

Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.
openai.com

item.title: @R to @OpenAI: GPT‑5.6 Sol launches with our most robust safety stack yet. We strengthened r...
item.description:
GPT‑5.6 Sol launches with our most robust safety stack yet.



We strengthened real-time protections against high-risk cyber activity and repeated misuse, then spent weeks hardening the system with human red teaming and over 700,000 A100-equivalent GPU hours of automated testing.

item.title: @R to @OpenAI: GPT-5.6 Sol is our most capable model yet for cybersecurity. It shifts the pe...
item.description:
GPT-5.6 Sol is our most capable model yet for cybersecurity.



It shifts the performance-efficiency frontier for long-horizon security tasks including vulnerability research and exploitation.

item.title: @R to @OpenAI: GPT‑5.6 Sol sets a new state of the art on Terminal‑Bench 2.1, which tests co...
item.description: GPT‑5.6 Sol sets a new state of the art on Terminal‑Bench 2.1, which tests complex command-line workflows requiring planning, iteration, and tool coordination.

item.title: @R to @OpenAI: Sol is our new flagship and a step function better than GPT-5.5. Terra delive...
item.description:
Sol is our new flagship and a step function better than GPT-5.5.



Terra delivers performance competitive to GPT-5.5 at 2x lower cost.



Luna is our most cost-efficient model, delivering strong capability at our lowest cost.



Together, the GPT-5.6 family gives people and developers more choice in how they balance intelligence, speed, and cost.

item.title: @R to @OpenAI: We believe in broad access and plan to make GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna gene...
item.description:
We believe in broad access and plan to make GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna generally available in the coming weeks.



For now, at the request of the U.S. government, we’re starting with a limited preview among a small group of trusted partners in Codex and the API.

item.title: @Introducing a limited preview of GPT-5.6 Sol, our next generation frontier model, as well as GPT-5.6 Terra, a balanced model for efficient, everyday work, and GPT-5.6 Luna, a fast and affordable model for high-volume work. https: Introducing a limited preview of GPT-5.6 Sol, our next generation frontier mo...
item.description:
Introducing a limited preview of GPT-5.6 Sol, our next generation frontier model, as well as GPT-5.6 Terra, a balanced model for efficient, everyday work, and GPT-5.6 Luna, a fast and affordable model for high-volume work.



openai.com/index/previewing-…

Link





Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model

OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.
openai.com

item.title: @R to @OpenAI: openai.com/index/how-agents-… Link How agents are transforming work A new Ope...
item.description:
openai.com/index/how-agents-…

Link





How agents are transforming work

A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
openai.com

item.title: @OpenAI: Work at OpenAI is being transformed by agents, in every department. Across ou...
item.description:
Work at OpenAI is being transformed by agents, in every department.



Across our entire company, people are using Codex to do work that is more complex, longer-running, and increasingly cross-functional.



Our internal usage offers an early look at how agentic tools may reshape work as they become more capable and broadly available.

item.title: @RT by @OpenAI: I’m very excited about this article from @OpenAI on my attempt to use GPT-5 P...
item.description:
I’m very excited about this article from @OpenAI on my attempt to use GPT-5 Pro to understand the results of an experiment we did several years ago. Remarkably, GPT-5 Pro figured out the key mechanisms, as explained in the article & infographic below! openai.com/index/gpt-5-immun…

Link





How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery

GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.
openai.com

item.title: @OpenAI: We have a new version of GPT-5.5 Instant for you, and it's much more fun to t...
item.description:
We have a new version of GPT-5.5 Instant for you, and it's much more fun to talk to.



Our most-used model is now better at understanding the intent behind a question and adapting its response accordingly.



It also handles complex constraints more reliably and makes shopping and local recommendations more useful and cohesive.



Rolling out today to paid users, tomorrow to free users.

item.title: @R to @OpenAI: openai.com/index/openai-broa… Link OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized i...
item.description:
openai.com/index/openai-broa…

Link





OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip

OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
openai.com

item.title: @We’ve designed and built our first AI chip: We’ve designed and built our first AI chip: Jalapeño. Designed from the groun...
item.description:
We’ve designed and built our first AI chip: Jalapeño.



Designed from the ground up by OpenAI and brought to production with @Broadcom, Jalapeño is purpose-built for the LLM workloads powering ChatGPT, Codex, the API, and future agentic products.



Chips are foundational to the AI economy. Building our own expands our full-stack platform from products to models to infrastructure, and will help us scale intelligence, serve more people, and expand access to AI.

item.title: @R to @OpenAI: You can also tune in from home. The opening keynote will be livestreamed on S...
item.description:
You can also tune in from home.



The opening keynote will be livestreamed on September 29.

item.title: @OpenAI DevDay 2026 applications are now open! Our biggest developer event gets even bigger. 📍 San Francisco 📅 September 29 Apply by July 10: OpenAI DevDay 2026 applications are now open! Our biggest developer event get...
item.description:
OpenAI DevDay 2026 applications are now open!



Our biggest developer event gets even bigger.



📍 San Francisco

📅 September 29



Apply by July 10: devday.openai.com/

Link





OpenAI DevDay 2026

Apply to attend OpenAI DevDay on September 29, 2026 in San Francisco for technical sessions, hands-on demos, workshops, and direct access to OpenAI teams building developer tools.
devday.openai.com

item.title: @R to @OpenAI: We’re also launching the OpenAI Daybreak Cyber Partner Program with leading s...
item.description:
We’re also launching the OpenAI Daybreak Cyber Partner Program with leading security software and services providers.



Participating partners can use GPT‑5.5 with Trusted Access for Cyber in the security products and services they provide to customers.



This allows their customers to benefit from the model’s defensive capabilities and make their software more resilient, but keeps direct model access in the hands of participating partners.

item.title: @R to @OpenAI: Patch the Planet is our effort to help open source maintainers move from secu...
item.description:
Patch the Planet is our effort to help open source maintainers move from security findings to merged fixes.



We’re working with Trail of Bits, HackerOne, Calif, researchers, and maintainers to bring Codex Security and advanced models into the remediation process, with human review at the center.


Video

item.title: @R to @OpenAI: GPT-5.5-Cyber is our most capable cyber model yet, designed for advanced, aut...
item.description: GPT-5.5-Cyber is our most capable cyber model yet, designed for advanced, authorized defensive work: tracing vulnerable code, validating issues, developing patches, and preparing evidence for human review.

item.title: @R to @OpenAI: Codex Security empowers defenders with out-of-the-box security workflows. Tea...
item.description:
Codex Security empowers defenders with out-of-the-box security workflows.



Teams can run deep scans, validate findings, trace attack paths, build threat models, generate codebase-specific patches for review, and export into the tools they already use.
